**Final Solution:**
```fsharp
let models = ["model1"; "model2"; "model3"]
let test_and_optimize model_name =
    integrate_model model_name
    test_model model_name
    optimize_model model_name

let generate_captions image_path =
    models |> List.map (fun model -> generate_caption image_path model)

let validate_captions captions expected_captions =
    captions |> List.map (validate_results expected_captions)
```
